evals.prompt: Run headless. A user says they want a large ambiguous school improvement platform. Produce the LENS routing decision and first artifact plan.
evals.expected_output: Routes to LENS discovery and context sufficiency before BMAD PRD.
expectations: Recommends bmad-lens-discover before bmad-create-prd.
Mentions discovery epoch, raw capture, extracted hypotheses, context sufficiency, and selected vertical slice.
States that PRD is not ready until context sufficiency passes.

evals.prompt: Run headless. A user says: I want to download images from 3D printing model websites. Produce the LENS artifact plan.
evals.expected_output: Creates a slice and does not create platform/system/domain/capability by default.
expectations: Creates or recommends slice.download_model_images.
Records artifact.model_image_set as produced output.
Explicitly avoids creating a platform, system, domain, service, or capability by default.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Multiple slices reuse artifact.model_image_set and repeat image metadata classification. Produce the promotion response.
evals.expected_output: Creates an evidence-backed promotion candidate but not automatic promotion.
expectations: Lists repeated pressure evidence.
Creates a promotion_candidate or promotion_gate.
Sets automatic promotion to false and requires human review.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Prepare a BMAD packet for slice.evidence_visible_to_teacher.
evals.expected_output: Focused BMAD packet with included scope, explicit exclusions, capabilities, decisions, risks, and acceptance evidence.
expectations: Includes active slice, slice goal, included scope, explicit out of scope, required capabilities, required decisions, risks, and acceptance evidence.
Excludes AI recommendations, coaching dashboards, district analytics, and family views.
Does not dump the whole system into BMAD.
Emits or references both bmad-packet.md and bmad-packet.yaml.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Discovery has weak journey readiness and unresolved evidence definitions. Decide whether BMAD PRD work may start.
evals.expected_output: Context-check blocks premature PRD creation and writes the gate artifacts.
expectations: Uses bmad-lens-context-check before bmad-lens-prepare-bmad.
States that PRD is not ready.
Writes or references context-sufficiency and context-score artifacts.

evals.prompt: Run headless. A slice impact map lists impacted workstreams, a conflicting workstream, shared files, shared contracts, and an impact_found gate. Produce the graph projection expectations.
evals.expected_output: Projects workstream impact into graph relationships, traceability, and warnings.
expectations: Creates impacted_by, possibly_conflicts_with, touches_file, and touches_contract relationships.
Adds impacted_workstreams, shared_files, and shared_contracts to traceability.
Emits a workstream_impact_gate warning when impact is found.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Validate one story that traces to slice.evidence_visible_to_teacher and one story that adds coaching dashboards without trace.
evals.expected_output: Passes the traceable story and fails or flags the scope-expanding story.
expectations: Checks story_traces_to_active_slice.
Checks story_does_not_expand_scope.
Flags the coaching dashboard story as fail or needs_review.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Implementation reveals teacher access cannot be determined from class roster alone. Produce a Salmon signal.
evals.expected_output: Raises upstream impact and recommends BMAD correct-course when appropriate.
expectations: Creates a salmon_signal with raised_from, severity, discovery, impacted_nodes, and recommended_action.
Includes impacted access policy or role-based visibility nodes.
Suggests bmad-correct-course for material scope or architecture assumption changes.

evals.prompt: Run headless. The LENS graph has duplicate IDs, an orphan relationship, missing source refs, stale records, and an unsynced BMAD packet. Produce Doctor findings.
evals.expected_output: Detects invalid topology and writes warnings and doctor report paths.
expectations: Detects duplicate IDs.
Detects orphaned or missing referenced relationships.
Detects missing source refs, stale or needs-review records, and BMAD sync gaps.
Mentions _bmad-output/lens/graph/warnings.yaml and _bmad-output/lens/graph/doctor-report.md.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Produce Auspex stakeholder status from an existing Derived Map.
evals.expected_output: Creates read-only status artifacts from Derived Map without mutating source truth.
expectations: Reads from _bmad-output/lens/graph/derived-map.json.
Writes status.yaml, status.json, and stakeholder-summary.md under _bmad-output/lens/auspex.
States that Auspex is read-only and not source truth.

evals.prompt: Run headless. Initialize LENS in a project that does not yet have _bmad-output/project-context.md.
evals.expected_output: Writes canonical LENS project context guidance.
expectations: Creates _bmad-output/project-context.md.
Includes Traceability Rule, Scope Rule, Architecture Rule, Upstream Change Rule, and Source Truth Rule.
Does not overwrite an existing project context file.
